name: worktrace-agent
description: Collect complete local coding-agent conversations and turn them into evidence-backed, OKR-led reports with rolling work profiles and relevant external research.

interface.shortDescription: OKR-led reports, rolling work profiles, and relevant external research
interface.longDescription: Collects and losslessly concatenates local coding-agent conversations, uses the current host model to generate validated OKR-led reports without dropping other important work, maintains a private rolling work profile, and appends separately sourced public research ranked by work relevance and timeliness.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use worktrace-report to create an evidence-backed, OKR-led daily or weekly report, keep other important work in a separate section, update the private work profile, and append relevant external optimization research.
